Localization.Description: An attempt to receive information about user privileges is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to receive information about another user's privileges by executing the query "{object.query}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received information about another user's privileges by running the query "{object.query}" on host {event_src.host}
